title: UsageRecord
description: One line of usage_log.jsonl — a single tracked model call. Read-only contract consumed by the Cost Analytics Dashboard; produced by CostTrackingPlugin in the ADK demos.

total_tokens.description: Stored as recorded; MAY exceed input_tokens + output_tokens because upstream folds reasoning/thinking tokens into the total. Never recomputed.

cost.description: Monetary cost as a variable-precision decimal string. MUST be aggregated with decimal arithmetic, never IEEE-754 float.

priced.description: If false, the record is excluded from cost totals but its tokens and call count are still counted.

agent.description: Name of the ADK agent that produced the call (coordinator, a delegated sub-agent, or a pipeline stage). OPTIONAL: records written before agent attribution lack it; consumers treat a missing value as "unknown".
